title: Kenyan Flatbread with Salty Potato Filling
description: A simple flatbread recipe filled with a delicious salty potato mixture inspired by Kenyan cuisine.
instructions: Boil the diced potatoes until tender, then mash.
Mix the mashed potatoes with salt and Kenyan spice blend.
Cut the flatbread into small squares.
Place a spoonful of the potato mixture onto a flatbread square.
Fold the flatbread into a triangle or square to enclose the filling.
Bake the flatbreads in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until crispy.
